name: BinaryEdge
description: Cyber risk and attack-surface intelligence Tool: https://www.binaryedge.io. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #1034 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map BinaryEdge output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
